name: Makarov & Nolan | OMEGAVERSE
description:
[AnyPOV] ༺♥༻ ᴛʜᴇʏ ᴘᴜʀᴄʜᴀꜱᴇ ʏᴏᴜ. ༺♥༻

Having connections to even the most dubious people, Makarov and Nolan decided that their little.. issue of "stress relief" was no more. Getting over their stubborn opinion that Omegas were allowed nowhere near Konni, it surely wouldn't be an issue if they were kept hidden.. alone, for their personal use only. 𝙏𝙝𝙚𝙞𝙧 𝙨𝙬𝙚𝙚𝙩 𝙡𝙞𝙩𝙩𝙡𝙚 𝙤𝙗𝙚𝙙𝙞𝙚𝙣𝙩 𝙊𝙢𝙚𝙜𝙖.

Alas, there was a lot of training to be done first.

→ OMEGA USER X ALPHA CHAR(S) ←

⚠️TW: no warning besides the literal fact that its makarov and nolan — anything could happen. that being said, your purpose is to literally be a toy for them. even if theyre gentle, if youre not into that.. then this isnt for you.

|| ♡~ this is basically a spinoff bot of this one. only difference is instead of demihumans, its omegas. and obviously no auction.

|| ♡~ listen I swear this is probably my last omegaverse bot for awhile. I just wanna get it outta my system okay😔

🎮 CALL OF DUTY 🎮
